title: John Ternus to become Apple CEO
author: schappim
aiHeadline: Apple finally decides to change their CEO, because what's the point of being a tech giant if you don't shake things up every 20 years?

title: All phones sold in the EU to have replaceable batteries from 2027
author: ramonga
aiHeadline: In 2027, EU phones will have replaceable batteries—because what's the fun of a dead phone if you can't just pop in a new battery, right?

title: GitHub's fake star economy
author: Liriel
aiHeadline: GitHub's fake star economy is booming—because nothing says 'I'm a real developer' like buying fake stars to impress your imaginary friends.

title: Kimi K2.6: Advancing open-source coding
author: meetpateltech
aiHeadline: Kimi K2.6: Finally, some progress in open-source coding—because waiting for updates is as fun as watching paint dry, right?

title: Qwen3.6-Max-Preview: Smarter, Sharper, Still Evolving
author: mfiguiere
aiHeadline: Qwen3.6-Max-Preview: Now smarter, sharper, and still evolving—because who doesn't love a model that's always changing, just like your favorite unstable AI.
